state.next-action: SITE BUILD-OUT COMPLETE — IA REFACTOR + 9 NEW PAGES + GLOBAL SEARCH + SKILLS REFACTOR. This session shipped: (1) Nav refactor with 5 dropdowns + GlobalSearch (Ctrl+K, 398 entries indexed), (2) Hero rewrite with pressure framing + Play primary CTA, (3) /requirements rendering v5 addendum with #R-v5.XX anchors, (4) /roadmap with pressure-tier progression bars, (5) /emergent CSH evidence rollup, (6) /tasks rendering 140 tasks grouped by phase with #anchors, (7) /phases rendering 28 phases with progress bars + per-phase task chips, (8) /bugs rendering data/bugs.json grouped by project, (9) /security with 6 attack-surface cards + GAD mitigations + future certification model, (10) /contribute with human-first 5-step flow + agent path explainer + 6 contribution paths, (11) /data provenance index with 16 sources + trust levels (deterministic/human/authored/self-report), (12) /skills new index page with 4 categories (fundamental/eval-authored/framework-inherited/framework-only) + extended /skills/[id] with SkillCopyActions client component (Copy SKILL.md / Copy frontmatter) + provenance sidebar showing eval runs that authored matching files. Ref component extended to 6 ID kinds with distinct color tints (decision/task/phase/requirement/question/bug). Prebuild parses 140 tasks + 28 phases + 77 decisions + emits search index. New decisions gad-75 (pressure as first-class dimension), gad-76 (target users + value prop), gad-77 (contribution flow human-first). ASSUMPTIONS.md captures all 12 IA answers + pressure definition. NEXT AGENT SESSION PRIORITY: (1) test fresh clone of the repo to validate gad-77 contribution flow assumptions (open question fresh-clone-contribution-test), (2) audit skills/ for create-skill/merge-skill/find-skills triumvirate per gad-73, build whatever's missing, (3) HTTP 529 investigation, (4) GAD v11 retry against v5 serially (round 5 start), (5) implement pressure-score formula per the open question (still authored in app/roadmap/page.tsx PRESSURE_BY_ROUND constant), (6) G2 skill-trigger coverage `gad eval check-triggers` CLI, (7) G3 build-exit-code capture in preservation pipeline, (8) optional: modal hybrid routing for Ref chips per Q4-C, retrofit Term + Ref across landing/lineage/methodology/findings, codex-vs-claude comparison (task 89). Round 5 ready against v5. Site is now substantially complete for primary user A (researcher) and secondary C (indie dev experiential entry). ROUND 5 UNBLOCKED + GLOSSARY LIVE + GAD-72/73/74 + GAPS DE-PLAYWRIGHT'D. v5 REQUIREMENTS.xml promoted from addendum to real XML in all 3 greenfield templates (escape-the-dungeon, -bare, -emergent) with full 21-requirement addendum section. v5 appended to REQUIREMENTS-VERSIONS.md. Prebuild updated to resolve v5 (and still v4) to the current template. GLOSSARY SYSTEM LIVE: data/glossary.json seeded with 27 terms across 7 categories, /glossary page rendering full definitions with category nav + cross-linked related terms + related decisions, Term component (server-side, native abbr+title, no client JS) wraps inline terms with dotted underline + hover tooltip + click-through to /glossary#anchor. Nav gains /glossary + /questions links (13 items — IA refactor is task 84, becoming critical). New decisions gad-72 (rounds framework: rounds defined by requirements version, differing eval versions per round, progressively more complex, earlier rounds re-evaluatable with new hypotheses, new hypotheses can start new rounds against any existing requirements version), gad-73 (fundamental skills triumvirate: find-skills + merge-skill + create-skill as GAD's foundational set — the meta-layer of the in-game rune/spell merging mechanic), gad-74 (GAD's real value prop is task management at scale in-repo + scientific skill/workflow evaluation, NOT "ship software faster"). Question resolutions: content-pack-injection-baseline RESOLVED as its own content-driven derivative eval track. New open questions: fundamental-skills-triumvirate audit, gad-value-prop-landing-page-framing, skill-security-model. GAPS.md REVISED: Playwright-based visual tests deferred per user directive ("careful about fast-paced changes, overhead of refactoring tests constantly"). Top-priority gaps now trace-event-based only: G2 skill-trigger coverage + G3 build exit code + G11 skill-inheritance hygiene. G1/G6/G9/G10 demoted to "revisit at UI stability." Bare v5 0.805, Emergent v4 rescored 0.885 (user beat floor 1 by skipping combat + gathering mana + crafting spells + fighting warden fresh — "fantastic representation of what a game should FEEL like"). NEXT AGENT SESSION PRIORITY ORDER: (1) ASSUMPTIONS.md (task 90) answering open question target-users-not-documented, (2) Audit skills/ for create-skill/merge-skill/find-skills existence, build missing triumvirate members (task 103 follow-up, gad-73), (3) IA refactor (task 84 — 13 nav items becoming unmanageable) with dropdown grouping + keyword search BEFORE more pages ship, (4) G2 skill-trigger coverage (`gad eval check-triggers` CLI command reading trace events vs EXPECTED-TRIGGERS.md) + G3 build-exit-code capture in preservation pipeline, (5) /roadmap timeline with per-round honest writeup + data-provenance captions per chart (task 88), (6) /security page (task 86), (7) skills directory with copy (task 85), (8) codex-vs-claude comparison (task 89). Round 5 CAN NOW RUN against v5 serially, but investigate HTTP 529 first before GAD v11. Round 4 anchor context: v5 REQUIREMENTS.xml is now at evals/*/template/.planning/REQUIREMENTS.xml with full 21-requirement addendum. Do NOT run against v4 anymore — v5 is the new base. Round 5 still hard-blocked on v5 promotion. Round 4 anchor context: v5 addendum at `evals/_v5-requirements-addendum.md` now has 21 requirements R-v5.01..21, three decisions still load-bearing (gad-68 emergent-evolution, gad-69 programmatic-eval priority, gad-70 Anthropic guide canonical), full backlog tasks 83-98. Bare v5 rubric: 0.805 (playability 0.70, ui_polish 0.85, mechanics 0.90, ingenuity 0.95, stability 0.55) — highest ingenuity of any round-4 run, multi-enemy encounters, great forge UI, affinity mechanic loved, pressure mechanics landed (subtle hints on map appreciated), but lacks targeting (wants UO-style rule-based combat), affinity reward unclear, no visual map + player location, unclear player/enemy identity in encounters, glitchy redraws across ALL round-4 builds, rune forge bug. Emergent v4 RESCORED 0.805 → 0.885: user beat floor 1 by skipping combat, gathering mana, crafting spells, then fighting warden fresh. Floor is beatable — "fantastic representation of what a game should FEEL like." Playability 0.65 → 0.88, ingenuity 0.80 → 0.95. V5 addendum extended with 9 more requirements (R-v5.13..21): rule-based combat a la Unicorn Overlord, entity-trait action policies for enemies AND NPCs, real-time game-time (1hr=1day, remove ticks), affinity reward loop, central visual nav map with player token, UO-style encounter visuals, spell-mixing-spells with procedural-but-semantic naming, rune uniqueness within a single spell, event-driven rendering to kill per-tick redraw glitches. New decisions: gad-71 (data/ JSON pseudo-database pattern formalized — hand-curated content files at vendor/get-anything-done/data/*.json, read by prebuild, typed into lib/eval-data.generated.ts). NEW SITE SHIPS: (1) Playable Archive cards now show review-status badges (reviewed emerald / needs-review pulsing rose / excluded grey) on both the run picker chips AND the sidebar card, (2) /questions page live rendering data/open-questions.json with 8 seeded open questions across hypothesis/evaluation/site/game-design/tooling/framework categories, (3) Nav gains Questions link. NEW PLANNING DELIVERABLES: .planning/GAPS.md — programmatic-eval gaps audit (task 83/96 done) with 12 ranked gaps, G1 gate-pass + G3 build-exit-code + G11 skill-inheritance-hygiene picked as highest-ROI wins, G4 tool-use-mix named as the reference pattern all new metrics should follow. data/bugs.json seeded with 4 bugs (rune-forge-same-rune-twice, notifications-persist, continue-after-death, glitchy-redraws — all from round 4). NEXT AGENT SESSION PRIORITY ORDER: (1) ASSUMPTIONS.md (task 90) + answer open question target-users-not-documented, (2) G1 gate-pass Playwright harness (task 88's phase 27 track 2) + G3 build-exit-code capture as the two highest-ROI programmatic-eval wins, (3) /roadmap timeline with per-round honest writeup + data-provenance captions on every chart (task 88), (4) /glossary + Term tooltip component (task 87 — unblocks jargon tooltips across all pages), (5) IA refactor with nav dropdowns + keyword search before more pages ship (task 84 — nav is now at 12 items with Questions added), (6) skills directory with copy (task 85), (7) /security page (task 86), (8) investigate HTTP 529 + promote v5 requirements into real REQUIREMENTS.xml + retry GAD v11 serially, (9) codex-vs-claude comparison implementation (task 89). Do NOT run against v4 anymore — v5 is the base. Round 5 ready once 529 investigation completes.
